posts.text: The # of distinct k-subsets (from n elements containing exactly k elements) is Binomial(n,k) For 2, 4,950 For 3, 161,700 For 4, 3,921.225 ... All: 1,267,650,600,228,229,401,496,703,205,376 So pay no head to explanations of Johnson's demise. Really, a very sad story.
